info.name: Banco Service API
info.description: Complete API collection for banco-service. Includes auth flow endpoints for login, refresh token, and logout.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Auth endpoints implemented in AuthController under /api/v1/auth. Login and refresh capture tokens automatically for protected requests.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { var json = pm.response.json(); if (json.accountCode) { pm.environment.set('lastAccountCode', json.accountCode); pm.environment.set('accountCode', json.accountCode); pm.environment.set('fromAccountCode', json.accountCode); } }
if (pm.response.code === 201) { var json = pm.response.json(); if (json.cardCode) { pm.environment.set('lastCardCode', json.cardCode); pm.environment.set('cardCode', json.cardCode); } }

if (pm.response.code === 201) { var json = pm.response.json(); if (json.transactionCode) { pm.environment.set('lastTransactionCode', json.transactionCode); pm.environment.set('transactionId', json.transactionId || json.id); } }
if (pm.response.code === 201) { var json = pm.response.json(); if (json.id) pm.environment.set('lastEmployeeId', json.id); }

if (pm.response.code === 201) { var json = pm.response.json(); if (json.email) pm.environment.set('lastUserEmail', json.email); if (pm.response.code === 201 && json.id) pm.environment.set('userId', json.id); }
